title: MEMORY_BRAM pass doesn't not consider potential RAMs

features.name: unpacked array memory with synchronous read
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array memory (reg [width-1:0] name [depth-1:0]) accessed synchronously in a clocked always block

features.name: memory initialization with readmemb
features.description: Code should include $readmemb or $readmemh used to initialize a memory array from an external file

features.name: address computation in memory access index
features.description: Code should include a memory access where the index is computed via shift or arithmetic operation on the address
